prompt: I inherited a monorepo with two apps and a native service. Please map the real repository roots, owners, startup and test commands, and existing reusable API and client contracts; save a concise navigation map, and then have the changed area checked for structural gaps.
Before changing anything, identify which child repository owns the failing login flow, its handler, and its API contract; I only need the ownership path, not a diagnosis or a fix.
Turn this approved feature brief into an executable implementation plan: split tasks by owner, list dependencies and required reads, define validation and reject gates, and stop before editing files.

Given an upcoming backend change, check whether my proposed work breakdown has complete ownership, dependencies, validation commands, and rejection criteria; do not inspect a code diff or modify files.
A Rust worker intermittently deadlocks under load. Reproduce the failure, confirm whether lock ordering or shutdown is the cause, and if confirmed apply the smallest code fix and run targeted tests.
A command exits with status 1 only when its configuration file is absent; reproduce it and establish whether parsing or path resolution causes the error, without changing source.
Review the current worktree for a new React route: classify task-owned versus unrelated changes, check contract completeness, and delegate a bounded UI audit before giving exact staging guidance.
Build a durable map of this multi-repository workspace's boundaries and reusable components; do not judge any pending diff or suggest staging.
The reviewed files are approved. Stage only the payment fix, inspect the staged diff, commit it with the agreed message, and push the current branch after checking divergence.
Inspect my uncommitted changes for mixed hunks and tell me whether they are safe to stage, but do not modify Git state.
Add keyboard navigation and async error states to the existing Vue settings form, reuse its primitives, run relevant checks, and then audit the changed UI profiles without committing.
The frontend already works; audit its state, layout, accessibility, and performance profiles and report findings without editing source.
Implement bounded cancellation for the Tokio export worker in the existing Rust crate, add focused tests, and audit the touched concurrency paths before I review the diff.
Inspect this Rust crate's SQLite and concurrency risks, run read-only checks, and report gaps; do not change code.
Audit the known Vue checkout surface for state and data contracts plus accessibility, using repository evidence only; report severity-ranked findings and validation gaps without editing.
Change the checkout form to reuse the shared dialog and add loading feedback; implement and test the patch.
Perform a read-only audit of the Rust service's unsafe FFI boundary and resource ownership; verify invariants and list unverified evidence.
Replace the Rust FFI wrapper's cleanup path with a typed guard, add tests, and run cargo checks.
Audit the known upload endpoint and storage path for authorization, traversal, content validation, and sensitive-data exposure; keep scope to these files and do not edit.
Review the full pull request for merge blockers, mixed hunks, tests, and release readiness, including any security concerns.

Using the authorized in-app browser session, inspect the account settings page, capture the rendered validation error and network response, and report before and after evidence; do not change account data.
Verify the real desktop client's window identity and capture a screenshot of its native settings panel; do not use a browser preview.
On macOS, verify the specified desktop app process and matching window, capture the native export dialog, and report its runtime source without clicking submit.
Open the staging URL in the browser, inspect the DOM and console for the missing export button, and report evidence.
Prepare a self-contained review package from this repository, then with my explicit authorization upload it to ChatGPT, run one external review round, and verify returned findings locally.
Prepare a self-contained package of this repository's diff, metadata, exclusions, and validation for an external reviewer, but do not upload or send it.
Rewrite the supplied architecture note for engineers: preserve factual claims and uncertainty, improve structure and voice, and return publication-ready prose without inventing details.
Turn this feature request into an owned implementation plan with dependencies, reject gates, and validation commands; do not rewrite the prose.
The Vue page freezes after navigating back from a modal. Reproduce the browser-visible failure, confirm the component lifecycle cause, then apply the scoped frontend fix and run its regression test.
The release review has already mapped the report-download endpoint; assess only tenant authorization and log exposure, and do not review merge readiness or edit files.
In the authorized browser session, navigate to the named documentation page and verify the new link target, title, and redirect behavior with screenshots; leave account state untouched.
Perform a capability preflight for the named desktop application, verify process and window enumeration plus screenshot support, and report any unavailable adapter without launching or restarting it.
Polish this source-grounded changelog for clarity while preserving its dates, attribution, uncertainty, and redaction boundaries; do not plan code or change facts.
The review is complete; stage and commit only the named files locally with the supplied message, and stop without pushing or opening a pull request.
Assess the immutable release candidate at the specified commit for migration, packaging, CI, and security regressions, and report severity-ranked blockers without modifying refs.
